kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Insert Into List
kw.doc: Inserts ``value`` into ``list`` to the position specified with ``index``.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.arg: msg=Robot Framework remote server binary not found (${DIRECTORY}/${BINARY_NAME}). Did you forget to build it in ${CONFIGURATION} configuration?
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

branch.condition: not ${SKIP_RUNNING_SERVER} and not ${SERVER_REMOTE_DEBUG} and not '${SYSTEM}' == 'Windows' and not ${NET_PLATFORM}

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

branch.condition: not ${SKIP_RUNNING_SERVER} and ${SERVER_REMOTE_DEBUG} and not '${SYSTEM}' == 'Windows' and not ${NET_PLATFORM}

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: Windows doesn't support server remote debug option.
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Import Library
kw.doc: Imports a library with the given name and optional arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Convert To Lower Case
kw.doc: Converts string to lower case.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Replace String Using Regexp
kw.doc: Replaces ``pattern`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Join Path
kw.doc: Joins the given path part(s) to the given base path.

test.name: Verify Power Management

kw.name: Wait For Line On Uart
kw.msg: Return: {'Groups': [], 'IsFailingString': False, 'Line': 'MicroPython started on Tang Nano 4K', 'Timestamp': 0.2}

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Write Line To Uart
kw.arg: start = time.ticks_ms(); machine.lightsleep(100); end = time.ticks_ms(); print("LS_OK:" + str(time.ticks_diff(end, start)))
kw.msg: Arguments: [ 'start = time.ticks_ms(); machine.lightsleep(100); end = time.ticks_ms(); print("LS_OK:" + str(time.ticks_diff(end, start)))' ]

kw.name: Wait For Line On Uart
kw.msg:
InvalidOperationException: Terminal tester failed!
Full report: ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 0] Attached to UART event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 0] [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 0] MicroPython started on Tang Nano 4K ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 3.8] Line containing >>MicroPython started on Tang Nano 4K<< event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 0] Tang Nano 4K with GW1NSR-LV4C ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 5.057] Line containing >>Tang Nano 4K with GW1NSR-LV4C<< event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 0] MicroPython c3ca843493 on 2026-03-24; Tang Nano 4K with GW1NSR-LV4C >>> import machine; print("MOD_O" + "K") [[no newline]] ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 359.9] Line containing >>import machine; print("MOD_O" + "K")<< event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 359] [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 361] MOD_OK ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 361.9] Line containing >>MOD_OK<< event: success) >>> import time; print("TIME_O" + "K") [[no newline]] ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 362.445] Line containing >>import time; print("TIME_O" + "K")<< event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 362] [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 364] TIME_OK ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 364.4] Line containing >>TIME_OK<< event: success) >>> machine.idle(); print("ID" + "LE_OK") [[no newline]] ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 364.8] Line containing >>machine.idle(); print("ID" + "LE_OK")<< event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 364] [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 367] IDLE_OK ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 367.3] Line containing >>IDLE_OK<< event: success) >>> start = time.ticks_ms(); machine.lightsleep(100); end = time.ticks_ms(); print("LS_OK:" + str(time.ticks_diff(end, start))) [[no newline]] ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 368.624] Line containing >>start = time.ticks_ms(); machine.lightsleep(100); end = time.ticks_ms(); print("LS_OK:" + str(time.ticks_diff(end, start)))<< event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 368] [[no newline]] ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:27, virt: 10370.332] Line containing >>LS_OK:([9][0-9]|[1][0-4][0-9]|150)<< event: failure)

InvalidOperationException: at Antmicro.Renode.RobotFramework.UartKeywords.OperationFail(TerminalTester tester) at Antmicro.Renode.RobotFramework.UartKeywords.DoTest[T](Nullable`1 timeout, Nullable`1 testerId, Func`3 test, Boolean expectBinaryModeTester) at Antmicro.Renode.RobotFramework.UartKeywords.WaitForLineOnUart(String content, Nullable`1 timeout, Nullable`1 testerId, Boolean treatAsRegex, Boolean includeUnfinishedLine, Nullable`1 pauseEmulation, Nullable`1 matchNextLine) at InvokeStub_UartKeywords.WaitForLineOnUart(Object, Span`1) at System.Reflection.MethodBaseInvoker.InvokeWithManyArgs(Object obj, BindingFlags invokeAttr, Binder binder, Object[] parameters, CultureInfo culture)

kw.name: Write Line To Uart
kw.arg: start = time.ticks_ms(); machine.lightsleep(500); end = time.ticks_ms(); print("LS_OK:" + str(time.ticks_diff(end, start)))

kw.name: Terminate Process
kw.doc: Stops the process gracefully or forcefully.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

Full report:
([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 0] Attached to UART event: success)

kw.name: Run Keyword If Timeout Occurred
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword if either a test or a keyword timeout has occurred.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get Variable Value
kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Replace String Using Regexp
kw.doc: Replaces ``pattern`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get Variable Value
kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Replace String Using Regexp
kw.doc: Replaces ``pattern`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.arg: Couldn't load the Dialogs library - interactive debugging is not possible
Test failed. Press OK once done debugging.
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc: Verifies that MicroPython can perform idle and lightsleep operations.
test.status:
InvalidOperationException: Terminal tester failed!
Full report: ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 0] Attached to UART event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 0] [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 0] MicroPython started on Tang Nano 4K ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 3.8] Line containing >>MicroPython started on Tang Nano 4K<< event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 0] Tang Nano 4K with GW1NSR-LV4C ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 5.057] Line containing >>Tang Nano 4K with GW1NSR-LV4C<< event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:15, virt: 0] MicroPython c3ca843493 on 2026-03-24; Tang Nano 4K with GW1NSR-LV4C >>> import machine; print("MOD_O" + "K") [[no newline]] ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 359.9] Line containing >>import machine; print("MOD_O" + "K")<< event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 359] [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 361] MOD_OK ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 361.9] Line containing >>MOD_OK<< event: success) [ Message content over the limit has been removed. ] [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 364] TIME_OK ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 364.4] Line containing >>TIME_OK<< event: success) >>> machine.idle(); print("ID" + "LE_OK") [[no newline]] ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 364.8] Line containing >>machine.idle(); print("ID" + "LE_OK")<< event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 364] [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 367] IDLE_OK ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 367.3] Line containing >>IDLE_OK<< event: success) >>> start = time.ticks_ms(); machine.lightsleep(100); end = time.ticks_ms(); print("LS_OK:" + str(time.ticks_diff(end, start))) [[no newline]] ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 368.624] Line containing >>start = time.ticks_ms(); machine.lightsleep(100); end = time.ticks_ms(); print("LS_OK:" + str(time.ticks_diff(end, start)))<< event: success) [host: 03/24/2026 12:50:17, virt: 368] [[no newline]] ([host: 03/24/2026 12:50:27, virt: 10370.332] Line containing >>LS_OK:([9][0-9]|[1][0-4][0-9]|150)<< event: failure)

kw.name: Wait For Process
kw.doc: Waits for the process to complete or to reach the given timeout.
